topics.title: Refuting Media Reports on Show Success
topics.summary: The studio addresses and refutes media reports claiming that celebrity guest bookings have dried up and that the program's influence is declining.

topics.title: Media Coverage and Satellite Radio Transition
topics.summary: The studio addresses reports regarding the host's career status, dismissing claims of declining ratings or personal distress while highlighting the success of his transition to satellite radio.

topics.title: Howard Stern Rejects Terrestrial Radio and Addresses Host
topics.summary: The studio explores Howard Stern's refusal to return to terrestrial radio despite media reports, his response to listener feedback regarding a film review, and a heated debate over internal tensions with co-host Robin Quivers following comments made by Sal.

topics.title: KISS Band References and Studio Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion about KISS-themed events, personal feelings of jealousy regarding media success, and various listener interactions.

topics.title: Robin Quivers Racing Experience
topics.summary: The studio discusses Robin Quivers' recent high-speed racing training and her upcoming competition against Bubba the Love Sponge.

topics.title: Acting Experiences and On-Set Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio explores the professional boundaries of filming love scenes, the impact of personal relationships on set, and the development of regional accents in acting.

topics.title: Media Coverage of Radio Reports
topics.summary: The studio addresses the fallout from a false news report regarding a radio segment and its subsequent coverage by television channels.

topics.title: Howard Stern Defends Sirius Success
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where Howard Stern refutes media reports claiming his career is failing or that he is unhappy at Sirius Satellite Radio.

topics.title: Jackass 2 Production and Stunts
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Steve-O and Bam regarding the filming of Jackass 2, discussing their physical risks, stunt preparation, and the commercial success of the franchise.

topics.title: Jackass Stunts and Celebrity Encounters
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the physical risks of Jackass stunts, personal experiences with celebrity figures like Jessica Simpson, and the dynamics of fame within the stunt community.

topics.title: Jackass Movie Promotion and Stunts
topics.summary: The studio features guests from the Jackass franchise discussing their upcoming film, personal anecdotes about celebrity encounters, and performing dangerous stunts for the broadcast.

topics.title: Steve-O and Bam Margera Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts Steve-O and Bam Margera as they discuss their stunts, drug use, interactions with celebrities like Paris Hilton and Christian Slater, and the production of their upcoming film.

topics.title: Refuting Media Reports of Career Dissatisfaction
topics.summary: The studio addresses and refutes media reports claiming the host is unhappy at Sirius Satellite Radio, asserting that his career is successful and he has no intention of returning to terrestrial radio.

topics.title: Refuting Media Reports on Satellite Radio Success
topics.summary: The studio addresses and dismisses inaccurate media reports regarding declining listenership and website traffic as a coordinated effort by terrestrial radio interests to undermine the success of satellite broadcasting.

topics.title: Media Rumors and Sports Highlights
topics.summary: The studio discusses rumors regarding a potential return to radio, the distribution of the Borat film via MySpace, Japanese longevity statistics, Mets' postseason prospects, and various celebrity appearances.

topics.title: International News and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio reviews reports on the conflict in Iraq, celebrity involvement in humanitarian issues in Sudan, and various entertainment news items including music releases and upcoming comedy shows.

transcript.text: Good morning.
